svg.font-family: Georgia, 'Iowan Old Style', 'Source Serif Pro', serif
svg.text: Reusable agents, connectors, and utilities — wire them into a drill-in flow.

text.tspan: Pulls 10-K and 10-Q full-text filings from EDGAR;
cached on disk by accession number.
Five-year price history, financials, and sector
multiples via yfinance with retry on flake.
Catalyst-oriented news search keyed to ticker;
top-15 results harvested per drill.
Summarizes growth, margins, and FCF; emits
Monte Carlo prior parameters for downstream sim.
Three thesis-aware sub-queries — risk factors,
MD&A trajectory, and segment performance.
Distills 5–7 catalysts and concerns, each tagged
bull / bear / neutral with linked source URLs.
Surfaces convergent signals, threshold breaches,
and implicit thesis gaps across all workers.
10,000 fair-value sims over growth, margin, and
exit-multiple priors. Returns P10 / P50 / P90 + samples.
Institutional Markdown report — Bull, Bear, Risks,
MC distribution, Action, Watchlist, and Evidence.
Renders the synthesis Markdown into a styled,
sage-paletted institutional PDF brief.
Slash commands trigger drill-ins; alerts and
replies push back to your phone.
Watches EDGAR + Tavily across all theses;
auto-fires drill-ins on material breach.

svg.text: research that thinks across theses, not tickers
